name: @igorstechnoclub/jar-tools-mcp
description: MCP server for the jar.tools JAR security scanner — scan .jar/.class files for supply-chain risk from an AI agent
author: igorstechnoclub

scripts.postinstall:
echo '
✨ jar-tools-mcp installed!
🔍 Scan a JAR: ask your agent to scan_jar_security on a local .jar file
🔑 Optional Pro license: export JARTOOLS_LICENSE_KEY=your-key
📖 API reference: https://jar.tools/kb/security-scan-api
'
